calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant, Huibin Zhu, appears as pro per with interpreter Francis Ha; respondent, Yook Dong Wong, appears as pro per (no appearance by Lijun Situ) with interpreter/case manager/witness Christie Yeung. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Brant.

EXHA - lease and various pictures
EXHA - copies of other case notices

EXHA (A-E) various paper for judge to keep; appellant, Zhu said no need to return.

10:43am
Matter is submitted. Newly unmarked evidence returned.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Judgment Entered
